[2018-12-17 15:48] awaclus: obviously someone making a stupid decision can result in an asymmetrical game

[2018-12-17 15:49] drevoed: and went full bp drones after just one enemy dead-eye.
[2018-12-17 15:50] awaclus: trinity and dynamo are op though so it's fine
[2018-12-17 15:51] drevoed: in at least 3 games on my memory they lost the game.
[2018-12-17 15:52] drevoed: you can ask msven for details, I'm sure he remembers those teaching moments.
[2018-12-17 15:52] awaclus: in other news: any kid rated
